title: Handle all return values explicitly in a webhook sender
prompt: The worker in `test_fixtures/discard_deprecated_worker.ex` uses the deprecated `{:discard, reason}` form in two places. Rewrite it completely: use `{:cancel, reason}` for both deprecated sites, and additionally handle a transient 5xx from `Webhooks.deliver/1` (assume it returns `{:error, {:http, status}}`) by returning `{:error, {:http, status}}` (so Oban retries via backoff). Add a `backoff/1` override that returns `2 * attempt * 30` for a linear backoff at 30s/60s/90s. Keep the module name and queue. Write to `lib/my_app/workers/webhook_delivery_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Combines deprecation fix, new error branch, and custom backoff in one module. Multi-step change.
